title: Django CMS Page Content
description: JSON Schema for a Django CMS page content object as returned by the djangocms-rest API

page_title.description: Page title used in the HTML <title> tag; falls back to title

menu_title.description: Title displayed in navigation menus; falls back to title

meta_description.description: SEO meta description for the page

redirect.description: Redirect URL if configured; null when no redirect is set

absolute_url.description: Absolute frontend URL for the page

path.description: Relative URL path of the page (e.g. 'blog/my-post')

details.description: API endpoint URL for this page

is_home.description: Whether this is the home/root page

login_required.description: Whether the page requires authentication to view

in_navigation.description: Whether the page appears in navigation menus

soft_root.description: Whether the page acts as a soft root for navigation

template.description: Template file used to render this page

xframe_options.description: X-Frame-Options header value for this page

limit_visibility_in_menu.description: Whether menu visibility is restricted by user auth state

language.description: Language code for this page content (e.g. 'en', 'de')

languages.description: All languages this page is available in

is_preview.description: Whether this response was served in preview/draft mode

application_namespace.description: Application namespace if the page is an apphook; null otherwise

creation_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the page was first created

changed_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the page was last modified

placeholders.description: Ordered list of placeholders defined by the page template

Placeholder.title: Placeholder
Placeholder.description: A CMS placeholder containing structured plugin content for a given slot

slot.description: Template slot name identifying this placeholder

language.description: Language code of the placeholder content

content.description: Ordered list of serialized plugin data objects

details.description: Direct API URL for this placeholder

html.description: Server-rendered HTML for the placeholder (only present when ?html=1 is requested)

PluginInstance.title: PluginInstance
PluginInstance.description: A serialized CMS plugin instance within a placeholder

pk.description: Primary key of the plugin instance

parent_plugin_type.description: Parent plugin type if this is a child plugin; null for root plugins
